title: FAX-505 A powerful Japanese play that makes a good woman feel like that A woman is waiting for Sole! - Emiko Koike
overview: The man forcibly urged the woman to have a physical relationship. "Even if it's a little rough, there is a way to get through with a crime ..." As the man says, instead of suing the man, the woman has a rather sullen look ... Well, what is the way the man got through? What the heck! ??
